description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the image_deploy:latest Docker image with a mysql:5.7 service and defines the variables DB_HOST=mysql, DB_USERNAME=root, MYSQL_DATABASE=homestead, and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=secret. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a unit_test job that runs the commands: composer install, cp .env.example .env, php artisan key:generate, php artisan migrate, and vendor/bin/phpunit. In the deploy stage add a manual deploy_production job that only runs on the master branch, sets up the production environment (name production, URL http://localhost), installs openssh-client if ssh-agent is missing, starts ssh-agent, adds the $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, creates ~/.ssh, disables strict host key checking when inside Docker, and finally executes ~/.composer/vendor/bin/envoy run deploy --on=production. Ensure the deploy job uses the defined environment and runs only when triggered manually.
